title: Road to School? Indirect Kiss? Butt on Lap? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: Shio and Akari, Eiyu's childhood friends, each try to get his attention in their own twisted way.

title: Full Bus? Drenched in Rain? Feelings Exposed? Admiring Them? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: Eiyu runs into Shio on the bus and then runs into Akari on his way home.

title: Admiring Them? Feeling Lonely? School at Night? Fantasizing? Old Promises? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: Shio and Akari find out Eiyu reads rom-coms.

title: Since I'm the Big Brother to the Little-Sister Type, Growing up Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: Runako moves back into the neighborhood for school and will live with Eiyu temporarily.

title: Extra Extra Hot? Finals Done? Bath Scene? Things Will Never Change? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: Akari eats very spicy curry bread. Eiyu ends up in the bath with the three of them. Shio studies with Eiyu.

title: Summer Beach? Looking Away? Spent the Night? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: Eiyu, Shio, Akari, and Runako go to the beach. Eiyu and Akari get left behind and spend the night together.

title: Relationship Talk? Sharing Half? Festival Vibes? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: Eiyu consults Runako about Akari. Akari and Shio admit to each other their feelings for Eiyu.

title: Kept Running and Missed the Fireworks? Since It Matters Too Much, It Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: Shio tells Eiyu she can't make the fireworks. Haru makes her first appearance.

title: An Unfamiliar Girl Who's Your "Guy Friend"? But if You Laugh, It Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: Eiyu, Shio, and Akari find out their childhood friend Haru is a girl.

title: Feeling the Afterglow Kiss After Kiss? Become a Sports Day Committee Member? Still Won`t Start a Rom-Com
overview: Eiyu is confused after being kissed by Haru and Shio. Shio and Eiyu become sports day committee members.

title: Scared? Lost Something? Let off Steam on Sports Day? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: Shio and Eiyu talk it out, and Eiyu has an epiphany.

title: Did the Three-Legged Race and Feel a Little Naughty? Then Doing the Scavenger Hunt Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
overview: It's Sports Day, and Eiyu takes on the impossible challenge of choosing who he really loves.
